prestazioni: Replacement of the stock **W16 quad-turbo (engine code: **QC16**)** turbochargers with **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II** billet wheel turbos, featuring 76mm compressor wheels and 88mm turbine wheels, paired with **Tial MV-R 64mm wastegates** and **custom 4-inch titanium downpipes** to eliminate backpressure and achieve a **2,200+ hp** target on **100-octane race fuel** with a **32 psi** boost ceiling.

Full **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management system with **Bosch Motorsport 1,200cc injectors**, **NGK R8992-10 laser iridium spark plugs**, and a **custom dry-sump oiling system** from **Dailey Engineering** to prevent oil starvation during sustained **3.5G lateral loads**, while integrating **Pectel SQ6M data logging** for real-time telemetry and traction control adjustments.

Installation of a **Penske 8760 3-way adjustable coilover suspension** with **custom titanium spring perches** and **Ohlins TTX46 MkII dampers**, paired with **Eibach ERS 1,200 lb/in springs** and **Bugatti-specific spherical bearing control arms** from **HRE Performance** to reduce unsprung weight by **18%** while maintaining structural rigidity for **Nürburgring Nordschleife** lap times under **6:45**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny x Bugatti Mistral** widebody conversion kit, featuring **carbon-fiber overfenders** with **integrated LED turn signals** and **3D-printed titanium wheel arches**, extending track width by **4.5 inches** while reducing drag coefficient to **Cd 0.31** via **active Gurney flaps** and a **full-length underbody diffuser** from **Vorsteiner**.

**BBS FI-R** forged magnesium wheels in **9.5x21 (front) and 12.5x21 (rear)**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (285/30 R21 front, 355/25 R21 rear) with **custom gold-anodized center locks** and **TPMS sensors** from **Schrader Electronics**, paired with **AP Racing 400mm carbon-ceramic brake discs** and **6-piston monoblock calipers** for **1,800°C heat resistance**.

**Lamborghini Sian-style** electrochromic glass roof panel from **Saint-Gobain Sekurit**, featuring **PDLC (Polymer Dispersed Liquid Crystal) technology** for instant opacity control, integrated with the **Bugatti Chiron’s** existing **LED matrix headlights** (upgraded to **Osram Laser+** for **800-meter illumination range**) and a **custom titanium exhaust finisher** from **Akrapović** with **electronically adjustable sound valves** for **120dB pops and crackles** on demand.
